response.overview: Between the blurred lines of the seen and the unseen, Melati brings her American boyfriend, Sam, on a homecoming trip to Bali. When Melati starts wailing in her sleep, the Island of the Gods responds by revealing Sam’s true colors. Their relationship is put to the test as his sunburn worsens and she believes him to be possessed.
response.title: ᬫᬾᬭᬳ᭄ᬤᬭᬳ᭄ᬓᬸ ᬧᬸᬢᬶᬳ᭄ᬫᬦᬶᬫᬸ
